title: Speech & Language Therapist - Adults (Full-time/Part-time/Locum)
description:
About THK Therapy Services (TS)

THK Therapy Services (TS) provides Speech and Language Therapy, Occupational Therapy, and Physiotherapy to THKMC programmes and other community partners. We adopt a holistic, family-centred care approach by collaborating closely with multidisciplinary teams, families, and caregivers.


As part of a therapy hub, our therapists work with a wide range of client profiles and are deployed across different services based on organisational needs.


About the Role

We are seeking Speech and Language Therapists (Adults) to join our allied health team. You will be supporting adults with communication, swallowing, and feeding needs in THK's disability homes, day activity centres, and home-based therapy services, among other community-based initiatives.


Therapists may be deployed across various adult-focused programmes depending on service requirements.


Key Responsibilities

  • Conduct assessments and provide speech and language therapy interventions for adult clients with communication and/or swallowing difficulties.
  • Develop and implement Individualised Care Plans (ICPs), working collaboratively with caregivers, nursing, and other allied health professionals.
  • Deliver therapy through individual or group sessions in centre-based or community-based settings, including home visits when required.
  • Provide caregiver and staff education to support clients' communication and swallowing needs in daily care routines.
  • Participate in multidisciplinary case discussions to contribute to holistic care planning for adult clients.

Qualifications

  • Bachelor's or Master's Degree in Speech and Language Therapy.
  • Fully registered or eligible for registration with the Allied Health Professions Council (AHPC), Singapore.
  • Passion for working with adults in residential, community, or home-based settings.
  • Strong interpersonal, communication, and collaboration skills.
  • Fresh graduates with suitable clinical experience in adult populations are welcome to apply.
  • 1 to 3 years of relevant experience in adult speech therapy is an advantage.


Professional Development Opportunities

  • Access to clinical supervision, mentorship, and ongoing professional development.
  • Opportunities to work alongside experienced therapists and multidisciplinary teams supporting children across a broad range of developmental needs.

Join Us

Be part of THK Therapy Services, where you'll help children unlock their potential and empower families to support their development. Make a meaningful impact in the community with us.

postedCompany.description:
THYE HUA KWAN MORAL CHARITIES LIMITED


THKMC was incorporated on 13 October 2011 as a charity to provide multiple social and welfare services to the community at large, and achieved an Institute of Public Character (IPC) status on 18 November 2011. THKMC is the charitable arm of Thye Hua Kwan Moral Society, which lives by the mission – To Serve Mankind – to help anyone who needs help regardless of their race, religion, colour, language, creed and culture. THKMC today serves more than 70,000 beneficiaries through more than 70 programmes across five Services, which include Disability, Early Intervention for Children, Family, Seniors’ Community, and Therapy.
